entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop associated with Bradyrhizobium rhizobia.

entities.name: BRADYRHIZOBIUM
entities.description: Rhizobia associated with cowpea that differ in their ability to produce siderophores.

entities.name: SIDEROPHORE
entities.description: Catechol-type iron-chelating compounds produced by rhizobia.

entities.name: SIDEROPHORE DETECTION AND ASSAY
entities.description: A method for the detection and assay of siderophores using radioactive 59Fe.

entities.name: RADIOACTIVE 59FE
entities.description: A radioactive isotope of iron used in the detection and assay of siderophores.
